ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_element_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_element_versions_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree earned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of degree completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_degrees_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_degrees_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of financial aid */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the aid was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "socio_economic_status" TEXT /* Socio-economic status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data element */,
  "data_element_name" TEXT /* Full name of the data element */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data element pertains to */,
  "dev_category" TEXT /* Development category of the data element */,
  "developer_friendly_name" TEXT /* Developer-friendly name for the data element */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Variable name used in the API */,
  "api_data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the value in the API */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the data element */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data element */,
  "scor" TEXT /* Score or additional metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data element */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data element */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data element */,
  "frequency_of_collection" TEXT /* Frequency of collection for the data element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., 2-year, 4-year) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the institution */,
  "public_private" TEXT /* Public or private status of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student is enrolled in */,
  "first_generation" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student is a first-generation student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who transferred */,
  "from_institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student transferred from */,
  "to_institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who completed */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student completed at */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree or certificate completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_completions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_completions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who withdrew */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student withdrew from */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data element was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES data_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., JSON structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
